text: <judgment> <court>Supreme Court of India</court> <case_number>Civil Appeal No. 1234 of 2026</case_number> <title>State of Karnataka v. Union of India</title> <date>2026-06-15</date> <judges> <judge>Justice A. B. Shah</judge> <judge>Justice C. D. Patel</judge> </judges> <body_text>The appeal is allowed. The judgment of the High Court is set aside. We direct that the status quo be maintained.</body_text> </judgment>
